016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.cli.config;
017
018import java.nio.file.Path;
019import java.nio.file.Paths;
020import java.util.Locale;
021
022public class XdgDataDir {
023    enum OS {
024        LINUX, MACOS, WINDOWS, UNKNOWN;
025        static OS get() {
026            String property = System.getProperty("os.name", "").toLowerCase(Locale.US);
027            if (property.isEmpty())
028                return OS.UNKNOWN;
029            else if (property.contains("linux"))
030                return OS.LINUX;
031            else if (property.contains("win"))
032                return OS.WINDOWS;
033            else if (property.contains("mac"))
034                return OS.MACOS;
035            else
036                return OS.UNKNOWN;
037        }
038    }
039
040    /**
041     * Return the Path to an XDG-style application configuration directory without making
042     * sure it exists or creating it. (No disk I/O)
043     *
044     * @param appName The name of the current application
045     * @return Path to the application configuration directory
046     */
047    public static Path getPath(String appName) {
048        return switch(OS.get()) {
049            case LINUX, MACOS, UNKNOWN -> getXdgConfigDir(appName);
050            case WINDOWS -> Path.of(System.getenv("APPDATA"), appName.toLowerCase());
051        };
052    }
053
054    /**
055     * Path to an app-specific configuration directory
056     * @param appName application name
057     * @return path to application's configuration directory
058     */
059    public static Path getXdgConfigDir(String appName) {
060        return getXdgConfigHome().resolve(appName.toLowerCase());
061    }
062
063    /**
064     * Return {@code $XDG_CONFIG_HOME} if defined, or  {@code $HOME/.config} otherwise.
065     * @return path to XDG configuration base directory
066     */
067    public static Path getXdgConfigHome() {
068        String xdgConfigHomeEnv = System.getenv("XDG_CONFIG_HOME");
069        return (xdgConfigHomeEnv != null && !xdgConfigHomeEnv.isEmpty())
070                ? Paths.get(xdgConfigHomeEnv)
071                : Paths.get(System.getProperty("user.home"), ".config");
072    }
073}
